entity.name: InfiniteZero Foundation
entity.description: Building a trustless, privacy-first AI commons — data stays local while applications train AI at scale, deployed on Ethereum for real-world impact.

projects.name: Decentralized Intelligence Network (DIN)
projects.description: Open infrastructure for training AI as a public good. Millions of devices contribute to shared AI models using federated learning — raw data never leaves the user's device.

channels.description: Contact for grants and institutional funding

plans.name: Protocol Sustainer
plans.description: Supports ongoing development of the DIN protocol, smart contracts, and federated learning infrastructure.

history.description: Edge City SHIFT Grant ($40k via Vitalik Buterin), Cosmos Institute grant ($5k)
